note: SINGLE machine-readable source of project status. Hand-edit THIS file; regenerate the Markdown with `python -m puckworks.statusdoc --write`. CI (`python -m puckworks.statusdoc --verify`) fails on stale/contradictory state. Active queue is capped at 5; completed history and superseded plans live in their own sections. Format is JSON (stdlib, no extra dependency) — the plan's `.yaml` was illustrative.

items.title: Typed, non-short-circuiting gate evaluation (every gate runs; failures all reported)
items.next_gate: evaluate_all_gates runs every gate after a failure; typed GateResult/GateSuiteResult; multi-failure + exception + zero-gate regression tests; JSON suite report in CI
items.acceptance_evidence: tests/test_gate_runner.py (seeded multi-failure reports all); CI uploads a JSON gate report

items.title: Real deterministic Paper 3 release archive (create/verify/inspect, full manifest)
items.next_gate: create-archive builds a deterministic tar with a full sha256+role+provenance manifest; verify-archive validates it without the source checkout; privacy/license scan; clean-room example from the wheel
items.acceptance_evidence: building twice from one commit gives equal archive hash (or documented normalized-manifest equality); altering any member fails verification

items.title: Aligned Python matrix + full transitive lock; Actions SHA-pinned; dependency review/audit
items.next_gate: release interpreter matches the lock interpreter; a fully-resolved lock; Actions pinned to immutable SHAs with no deprecation warnings; dependency-review + vulnerability audit active
items.acceptance_evidence: min-deps and locked-release lanes both pass; CI has no deprecated-action warnings

items.title: Cut a verifiable v0.2.0 (version/citation/tag/manifest/notes agree) + a draft GitHub Release
items.next_gate: version-sync test across pyproject/__version__/CITATION/tag/manifest/notes; all release lanes green on one frozen commit; draft GitHub Release with the verified payload
items.acceptance_evidence: a fresh user installs the wheel and runs the bundled example without cloning; release provenance identifies one exact commit

items.title: Explicit units (bar-gauge vs pascal), versioned trace schema + validators, typed public results
items.next_gate: SI-internal units policy; pressure-field audit before any behaviour change; factor-of-100000 regression; versioned trace schema; type-check + coverage baselines for core modules
items.acceptance_evidence: invalid dimensions/lengths/fractions fail early; existing valid examples numerically unchanged (regression tests)

items.title: Paper A submission: venue, literature-search reconciliation, authorship/conflicts/funding, PI approval
items.external_blocker: human sign-off (venue, authorship, approval) — not an engineering task
items.resume_trigger: PI provides venue + author order/contributions/conflicts/funding + explicit approval to build the release
items.next_gate: clean-tree release build once the human decisions are recorded (code core already verifies: paper_a.build verify, 27/27 claims match)
items.acceptance_evidence: paper_a.build verify green (27/27); awaiting recorded human decisions

items.title: Sanctioned coherent visualizer corpus export (immutable, license-recorded) for publication use
items.external_blocker: Miha-side bulk export/token; the public API only exposes a recent-updated window, not the historical corpus
items.resume_trigger: a sanctioned export exists with recorded redistribution rights, a stable pinned schema/version, and a committed checksum + provenance record
items.next_gate: run the WP7 pilot on the real immutable export (synthetic contract + importer already exist)
items.acceptance_evidence: corpus_export + SANCTIONED_EXPORT_SPEC.md + synthetic end-to-end pipeline exist; awaiting the real export

items.title: Paper 3 per-claim evidence graph (schema v2): 51/51 adjudicated; roll-up + zero-gate policies enforced
items.acceptance_evidence: paper3-scope-strict + all-scope-strict required checks green; tests/test_evidence_graph.py

items.title: Lateral-coupling feasibility: two-node model + matched proxy discrimination (exact Xi, continuous alpha)
items.acceptance_evidence: representational/mathematical distinguishability only; measurability + identifiability stay OPEN; Paper 4 NOT authorized

items.title: Remediation waves R0-R9 (quick-CI red fix, lane rigor, doc-truth, release pipeline, governance, lint, privacy)
items.acceptance_evidence: PRs #1-#7 merged CI-green; branch protection + Dependabot enabled

items.title: Planning snapshot: NEXT_STEP_PLAN_2026-07-16 (publication-integrity convergence lane)
items.acceptance_evidence: archived under docs/planning/archive/ with a non-authoritative banner

items.title: Planning snapshot: PRODUCT_FIRST_REPRIORITIZATION (product vertical-slice lane)
